rationale: Elec. Code §254.036 governs the form, affidavit, and electronic filing of campaign finance reports. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: Each report filed under this chapter with an authority other than the commission must be in a format prescribed by the commission.
_note: The cited rule is entirely unrelated to the proposed change regarding homestead exemption amounts.
